resources.title: Overview
resources.description: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that reads your codebase, edits files, runs commands, and integrates with your development tools. Available in your terminal, IDE, desktop app, and browser.

resources.title: Choose a permission mode
resources.description: Control whether Claude asks before editing files or running commands. Cycle modes with Shift+Tab in the CLI or use the mode selector in VS Code, Desktop, and claude.ai.

resources.title: Configure permissions
resources.description: Control what Claude Code can access and do with fine-grained permission rules, modes, and managed policies.

resources.title: Platforms and integrations
resources.description: Choose where to run Claude Code and what to connect it to. Compare the CLI, Desktop, VS Code, JetBrains, web, mobile, and integrations like Chrome, Slack, and CI/CD.

resources.title: Constrain plugin dependency versions
resources.description: Declare version constraints on plugin dependencies so your plugin keeps working when an upstream plugin ships a breaking change.

resources.title: Recommend your plugin from your CLI
resources.description: Emit a one-line marker from your CLI so Claude Code prompts users to install your official plugin.

resources.title: Create and distribute a plugin marketplace
resources.description: Build and host plugin marketplaces to distribute Claude Code extensions across teams and communities.

resources.title: Create plugins
resources.description: Create custom plugins to extend Claude Code with skills, agents, hooks, and MCP servers.

resources.title: Plugins reference
resources.description: Complete technical reference for Claude Code plugin system, including schemas, CLI commands, and component specifications.

resources.title: How Claude Code uses prompt caching
resources.description: Claude Code manages prompt caching automatically. See why a model switch triggers a slow uncached turn, what `/compact` costs, why CLAUDE.md edits don't apply mid-session, and how to check your cache hit rate.

resources.title: Prompt library
resources.description: Copy-paste prompts for Claude Code, tagged by task and role.

resources.description: Continue a local Claude Code session from your phone, tablet, or any browser using Remote Control. Works with claude.ai/code and the Claude mobile app.

resources.title: Automate work with routines
resources.description: Put Claude Code on autopilot. Define routines that run on a schedule, trigger on API calls, or react to GitHub events from Anthropic-managed cloud infrastructure.

resources.title: Configure the sandboxed Bash tool
resources.description: Learn how Claude Code's sandboxed Bash tool provides filesystem and network isolation for safer, more autonomous agent execution.

resources.title: Run prompts on a schedule
resources.description: Use /loop and the cron scheduling tools to run prompts repeatedly, poll for status, or set one-time reminders within a Claude Code session.

resources.description: Learn about Claude Code's security safeguards and best practices for safe usage.

resources.description: Centrally configure Claude Code for your organization through server-delivered settings, without requiring device management infrastructure.

resources.description: Configure Claude Code with global and project-level settings, and environment variables.

resources.title: Advanced setup

resources.description: Create, manage, and share skills to extend Claude's capabilities in Claude Code. Includes custom commands and bundled skills.

resources.description: Delegate coding tasks directly from your Slack workspace

resources.title: Customize your status line
resources.description: Configure a custom status bar to monitor context window usage, costs, and git status in Claude Code

resources.title: Create custom subagents
resources.description: Create and use specialized AI subagents in Claude Code for task-specific workflows and improved context management.

resources.title: Configure your terminal for Claude Code
resources.description: Fix Shift+Enter for newlines, get a terminal bell when Claude finishes, configure tmux, match the color theme, and enable Vim mode in the Claude Code CLI.

resources.title: Enterprise deployment overview
resources.description: Learn how Claude Code can integrate with various third-party services and infrastructure to meet enterprise deployment requirements.

resources.title: Tools reference
resources.description: Complete reference for the tools Claude Code can use, including permission requirements and per-tool behavior.

resources.title: Troubleshoot installation and login
resources.description: Fix command not found, PATH, permission, network, and authentication errors when installing or signing in to Claude Code.

resources.title: Troubleshooting
resources.description: Fix high CPU or memory usage, hangs, auto-compact thrashing, and search problems in Claude Code, and find the right page for other issues.

resources.title: Plan in the cloud with ultraplan
resources.description: Start a plan from your CLI, draft it on Claude Code on the web, then execute it remotely or back in your terminal

resources.title: Find bugs with ultrareview
resources.description: Run a deep, multi-agent code review in the cloud with /code-review ultra to find and verify bugs before you merge.

resources.description: Speak your prompts in the Claude Code CLI with hold-to-record or tap-to-record voice dictation.

resources.description: Install and configure the Claude Code extension for VS Code. Get AI coding assistance with inline diffs, @-mentions, plan review, and keyboard shortcuts.

resources.description: Run Claude Code in the cloud from your browser or phone. Connect a GitHub repository, submit a task, and review the PR without local setup.

resources.title: Week 13 · March 23–27, 2026
resources.description: Auto mode for hands-off permissions, computer use built in, PR auto-fix in the cloud, transcript search, and a PowerShell tool for Windows.

resources.title: Week 14 · March 30 – April 3, 2026
resources.description: Computer use in the CLI, interactive in-product lessons, flicker-free rendering, per-tool MCP result-size overrides, and plugin executables on PATH.

resources.title: Week 15 · April 6–10, 2026
resources.description: Ultraplan cloud planning, the Monitor tool with self-pacing /loop, /team-onboarding for packaging your setup, and /autofix-pr from your terminal.

resources.title: Week 16 · April 13–17, 2026
resources.description: Claude Opus 4.7 with the new xhigh effort level, Routines on Claude Code on the web, mobile push notifications that ping your phone when Claude needs you, a /usage breakdown that shows what's driving your limits, and native binaries replacing the bundled JavaScript.

resources.title: Week 17 · April 20–24, 2026
resources.description: /ultrareview opens as a research preview, automatic session recaps when you return to a terminal, custom color themes you can build and ship in plugins, and a redesigned Claude Code on the web.

resources.title: Week 18 · April 27 – May 1, 2026
resources.description: Claude Code on Windows runs without Git Bash, claude auth login accepts a pasted OAuth code when the browser callback can't reach localhost, claude project purge cleans up local state per project, and pasting a PR URL into /resume finds the session that created it.

resources.title: Week 19 · May 4–8, 2026
resources.description: Load plugins from .zip archives and URLs, search command history across every project with Ctrl+R, branch new worktrees from local HEAD or the remote default, and block actions unconditionally with auto mode hard deny rules.

resources.title: Week 20 · May 11–15, 2026
resources.description: Manage every Claude Code session from one screen with agent view, keep Claude working toward a goal until a condition holds, and run fast mode on Opus 4.7 by default.

resources.title: Week 21 · May 18–22, 2026
resources.description: Use auto mode on the Pro plan and with Sonnet 4.6, see which skills, subagents, and MCP servers drive your plan limits in /usage, and review diffs with the new /code-review command.

resources.title: Week 22 · May 25–29, 2026
resources.description: Run Claude Code on Claude Opus 4.8, orchestrate large tasks with dynamic workflows, catch security issues with the security-guidance plugin, and use fast mode on Opus 4.8 at a lower price.

resources.title: Week 23 · June 1–5, 2026
resources.description: Run auto mode on Bedrock, Vertex, and Foundry, prompt before writing files that can run code in acceptEdits mode, list installed plugins with /plugin list, and require an approved version range for managed deployments.

resources.title: Week 24 · June 8–12, 2026
resources.description: Move a session to a new directory with /cd, let subagents spawn their own subagents, and troubleshoot a broken configuration with safe mode.

resources.title: What's new
resources.description: A weekly digest of notable Claude Code features, with code snippets, demos, and context on why they matter.

resources.title: Orchestrate subagents at scale with dynamic workflows
resources.description: Dynamic workflows orchestrate many subagents from a script Claude writes and you can rerun. Use them for codebase audits, large migrations, and cross-checked research.

resources.title: Run parallel sessions with worktrees
resources.description: Isolate parallel Claude Code sessions in separate git worktrees so changes don't collide. Covers the `--worktree` flag, subagent isolation, `.worktreeinclude`, cleanup, and non-git VCS hooks.

resources.title: Zero data retention
resources.description: Learn about Zero Data Retention (ZDR) for Claude Code, available to qualified accounts on Claude for Enterprise, including scope, disabled features, and how to request enablement.

resources.title: anthropics/anthropic-quickstarts
